entities.name: Getro
entities.context: Third-party talent/hiring data tool that VC platform teams currently use; Careerspan positions against it

entities.name: HireVue
entities.context: Prior leadership expressed serious acquisition interest in Careerspan at an early stage

entities.name: Invoice Butler
entities.context: Company led by Mihir, a second-time YC founder, focused on capital efficiency

entities.name: Mihir
entities.context: Second-time YC founder leading Invoice Butler with strong go-to-market experience

entities.name: Y Combinator
entities.context: Accelerator program; Mihir is a second-time YC founder

entities.name: Capital Efficiency
entities.context: Core operating philosophy for both Careerspan (near-profitability focus) and Invoice Butler (independence from venture funding)

entities.name: No Code Until Payment
entities.context: Invoice Butler's core validation rule — no engineering work until a customer is willing to pay

entities.name: Acquisition Story
entities.context: Careerspan's strategic framing: building a compelling acquisition narrative grounded in real usage, data assets, and brand

entities.name: VC Platform Teams
entities.context: Target buyer segment — VC funds with talent teams wanting to own hiring data and offer useful support to portfolio companies

entities.name: Product Validation via Mockups
entities.context: Invoice Butler's early-stage approach using mockups and scrappy demos instead of fully-built tech

relationships.context: Mihir leads Invoice Butler as founder
Mihir is a second-time YC founder
Core operating rule: no code until someone is willing to pay
Strong emphasis on capital efficiency and independence from venture funding
Early validation via mockups and scrappy demos rather than fully-built tech
VC talent teams currently use Getro but may want to own their own data
Prior HireVue leadership expressed serious acquisition interest, validating the acquisition narrative
Both concepts support Careerspan's strategy of not raising more VC and building toward near-profitability
